professional_service.label: Professional Service
professional_service.description: Coordinators and catering staff execute your plan with grace. Service begins and ends at load-in/load-out at The Fluted Mushroom. All linens and rentals are the client's responsibility.
professional_service.notes: All prices are subject to change.

bar_services.name: Full Bar Service
bar_services.description: Including alcohol, charged according to client's request

bar_services.name: Bar Service with Soda, Mixers and Bar Fruit
Bar Service
bar_services.description: If client provides alcohol and non-alcoholic beverages
